case_title: LORENZO, CARLOS VS MUNOZ, RONIVAN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, RONIVAN
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES & COSTS FILED
PER JULIE ABUSHARKH, AVELINA PRITCHARD ASSIGNED AS SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR LORENZO, CARLOS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-27-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-23-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF HAS A WAIVER OF COURT COSTS. COURT TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LORENZO, CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MUNOZ, RONIVAN SAN JUAN, ERLINDA DEFENDANT ERLINDA SAN JUAN DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LORENZO, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, RONIVAN SAN JUAN, ERLINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
